title: hieracium tephropogon subsp. subintermedium
intro:
Hieracium tephropogon subsp. subintermedium is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly referred to as hawkweed. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which are traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Hieracium tephropogon subsp. subintermedium include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant's roots and leaves are dried and prepared as infusions, tinctures, or salves for medicinal use.
